name: select
description: Dropdown select with searchable option list, custom trigger, custom item renderer, and accessibility

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback fired when the user selects a different option.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of options to display in the picker list.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when no option is selected.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional label text displayed above the trigger.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, the select is non-interactive.

props.name: error
props.description: When true, applies an error border color to the trigger.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error message displayed below the trigger when error is true.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer container.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom trigger renderer; receives the currently selected option.

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Custom option row renderer; replaces the default label/description layout.

props.name: searchable
props.description: When true, shows a search input inside the picker to filter options.

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Accessibility label for the trigger; defaults to the label prop.

props.name: accessibilityHint
props.description: Accessibility hint for the trigger element.
